description.p: wxNote is a cross-platform (Windows, Linux, macOS) text editor built on wxWidgets and the Scintilla and Lexilla editing/highlighting engines. It ships a full User-Defined Language system, a Function List with rules derived from each supported language's own grammar, session restore, macros, print preview, and full UI localization into 8 languages, alongside an original, permissive, cross-platform plugin API with optional support for real compiled Notepad++-ABI plugin binaries on Windows.
